base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of gibdo_walk — a character (playable) from 1986 legend of zelda. Gibdo — bandaged mummy. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Gibdo — bandaged mummy; 2-frame shamble; slow, high-HP. Freezes Link briefly on contact
